businessQuestion: Which products incur the highest handling costs because of returns?
sqlAnswer:
SELECT
    DP.PRODUCT_NAME,
    DP.CATEGORY,
    SUM(FR.HANDLING_COST_AMT) AS TOTAL_HANDLING_COST,
    SUM(FR.REFUND_AMT) AS REFUND_AMOUNT
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_RETURNS FR
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_PRODUCT DP
ON FR.PRODUCT_KEY=DP.PRODUCT_KEY
GROUP BY
    DP.PRODUCT_NAME,
    DP.CATEGORY
ORDER BY TOTAL_HANDLING_COST DESC;
businessContext: Finance teams want to reduce reverse logistics costs.
